revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hime- Shrine
| native_name = 姫皇子命神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hime- Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.535574|135.788912}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hime- Shrine'''|姫皇子命神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|qid=Q135100459|1=Shikinai Subshrine}}
* {{ill|Q135009977|ltq=Q135009977|qid=Q135009977|1=Keigai-Sessha}}
* {{ill|Q135160338|ltq=Q135160338|qid=Q135160338|1=Kanpei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}
** P155: {{ill|Miko- Shrine|lt=Miko- Shrine|qid=Q135098855|1=Miko- Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135098861|ltq=Q135098861|qid=Q135098861|1=Womori- Shrine}}
* {{ill|Q11430652|ltq=Q11430652|qid=Q11430652|1=Oonimasumishiritsuhiko Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Yamato Province|lt=Yamato Province|be|Ямата (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Yamato|ckb|پارێزگای یەماتۆ|cs|Provincie Jamato|de|Provinz Yamato|el|Επαρχία Γιαμάτο|en|Yamato Province|es|Provincia de Yamato|fa|ولایت یاماتو|fi|Yamaton provinssi|fr|Province de Yamato|gl|Provincia de Yamato|hak|Yamato-koet|id|Provinsi Yamato|it|Yamato (provincia)|ja|大和国|ko|야마토국|lt|Jamato žemė|nl|Yamato (provincie)|no|Yamato (provins)|pt|Província de Yamato|ro|Provincia Yamato|ru|Ямато (провинция)|simple|Yamato Province|sk|Jamato (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамато|th|แคว้นยามาโตะ|tr|Yamato (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямато|ur|یاماتو صوبہ|zh_min_nan|Yamato-kok|zh_yue|大和國|zh|大和國|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}}
* {{ill|Q11405036|ltq=Q11405036|qid=Q11405036|1=Toichi district}}

* {{coord|34.535574|135.788912}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
